name: Turkey Stew with Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a Dutch oven until it is partially crisp.
2. Add turkey and onion to the pot; cook until the meat is no longer pink.
3. Stir in carrots, celery, 1 3/4 cups water, chicken broth, rosemary, and bay leaf.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Mix flour with 1/4 cup water until smooth; stir this into the stew.
6. Return the pot to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Remove the bay leaf, season with salt and pepper as desired.
8. Combine Bisquick and milk in separate bowl.
9. Drop rounded tablespoons of the mixture onto the stew.
10. Cook uncovered for 10 minutes; then cover and cook an additional 10 minutes.
Makes 4 to 5 servings.
